title: Roper Technologies, Inc. (ROP) on Frontline Education Acquisition (Transcript)
text: Roper Technologies, Inc. (NYSE:ROP ) Frontline Education Acquisition Call August 30, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Zack Moxcey - Vice President, Investor Relations Neil Hunn - President and Chief Executive Officer Rob Crisci - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Deane Dray - RBC Capital Markets Christopher Glynn - Oppenheimer Julian Mitchell - Barclays Joe Giordano - Cowen Steve Tusa - JPMorgan Rob Mason - Baird Operator Good morning. The Roper Technologies Conference Call will now begin.

title: Roper Technologies Makes A Shrewd Purchase With Frontline Education
text: Roper's M&A strategy has entered a new phase as the company announced a big purchase on Tuesday. This deal, particularly in light of last year's TransCore sale, should have a great result for shareholders.

title: Roper Technologies buying Frontline Education from Thoma Bravo for $3.73 bln
text: Roper Technologies Inc. ROP, -0.16% said Tuesday it agreed to buy cloud-based software company Frontline Education for about $3.725 billion in cash from seller Thoma Bravo LP. The transaction is expected to close in the fourth quarter.

title: Thoma Bravo Enters into Agreement to Sell Frontline Education to Roper Technologies
text: SAN FRANCISCO and MALVERN, Pa. , Aug. 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Thoma Bravo, a leading software investment firm, today announced it has signed a definitive agreement to sell Frontline Education ("Frontline"), a leading provider of administration software purpose-built for educators in K-12, to Roper Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: ROP) in an all-cash transaction that values Frontline at approximately $3.725 billion.

title: Roper Technologies to Acquire Frontline Education

title: DAT introduces the DAT One app, providing expanded mobile access to the industry's largest load board
text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DAT Freight & Analytics, the largest on-demand freight marketplace and leading provider of data and analytics to the freight and trucking industry, today announced the launch of a new product, the DAT One app. Built specifically to help truckers find profitable loads and run their businesses successfully while out on the road, the new app includes all of the features of DAT's Load Board for Truckers, plus many more tools at no extra cost. title: Aderant Signs Deal to Acquire viGlobal, Adding Leading People Management Software Platform for Law Firms to Its Growing Product Family
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #Atlanta--Aderant announced today that it has signed a definitive agreement to acquire the assets of viGlobal, a leading provider of people management software.

title: Roper Technologies: Transformation Near Completion
text: Roper continues to transform the business, reducing leverage in the meantime. The company has largely completed its repositioning now, having the capacity to acquire businesses again.
